sections.title: Hotel Blocks
sections.description: We reserved preferred rates at Radisson Blu Temple Bay, Intercontinental Chennai, and The Leela Palace for guests arriving from out of town.

sections.title: Airport Transfers
sections.description: Private transfers from Chennai International Airport can be arranged through our concierge partner. Share your arrival time and we will coordinate the pickup.

sections.title: City Guide
sections.description: We put together our favourite cafes, temple visits, Marina Beach walks, and rooftop dinners around Chennai for a memorable long weekend.

essentials.title: Government Hospital Mahabalipuram
essentials.description: 4 km from venue. Open 24 hours. Emergency services available.

essentials.title: Apollo Pharmacy
essentials.description: 1.2 km from venue. Open until midnight. Prescription and OTC medicines.

essentials.title: Nearest Bus Stop
essentials.description: 500 m from the venue gate on East Coast Road.

essentials.title: Chennai Airport
essentials.description: Approx 50 km from venue. Terminal 1 & 2. Cab approx 60-90 minutes.

essentials.title: Wedding Coordinator
essentials.description: Reach out if you need any help during your stay. Available from 8 AM to 10 PM.

faq.question: Which airport should we fly into?
faq.answer: Fly into Chennai International Airport (MAA). It is roughly 50–60 km from Blue Bay Beach Resort, Mahabalipuram, depending on traffic.

faq.question: Is transportation provided between venues?
faq.answer: Yes. Shuttle loops begin 45 minutes before every scheduled event and return after the final departure.

faq.question: Can children attend?
faq.answer: Children are welcome at all events. Please indicate the number of children in your RSVP so we can make the right arrangements.

faq.question: What is the nearest railway station?
faq.answer: Chennai Egmore and Chennai Central are the main stations, both approximately 55 km from the venue. Local trains to Chengalpattu are another option.

arrivalTips: December evenings in Chennai are pleasant but can be breezy near the coast — pack a light layer for outdoor events after sunset.
East Coast Road (ECR) is the main route to Mahabalipuram. Expect moderate traffic on weekends; plan to arrive 30 minutes early.
Please keep a screenshot of your personalized invite link for quick check-in at the venue entrance.
Parking is available at the resort premises. Overflow parking is at the adjacent lot 200 m from the gate.
